<!-- Thanks for contributing to MeadOS! Please fill this in. -->

## What does this change?

Briefly describe the change and the problem it solves. Link any related issue
(e.g. `Closes #12`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Recipe / content update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs

## How was it tested?

- [ ] Ran `python3 server.py` and exercised the change in the browser
- [ ] No new errors in the browser console
- [ ] Checked on a narrow (mobile) width if it's a UI change

## Checklist

- [ ] Matches the surrounding code style (vanilla JS, no framework, no build step)
- [ ] Functions stay global where inline `onclick` handlers depend on them
- [ ] New `core/*.js` module (if any) is added to `index.html` in the correct load order
- [ ] No user data committed (`meados.db`, `assets/labels|photos|brand`)
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under the project's
      [PolyForm Noncommercial License](../LICENSE)
